evals.prompt: Design a REST API for the Order aggregate: create order, get order, list orders (paginated), add item to order, confirm order, cancel order.
evals.expected_output: OpenAPI-style spec with proper methods, status codes, RFC 7807 errors, cursor pagination
expectations: Correct HTTP methods and status codes (201 for create, 200/204 for updates)
RFC 7807 error format on all error responses
No 200 OK with error in body

evals.prompt: Review this API: POST /api/processOrder always returns 200 OK. Errors come back as {"success": false, "error": "Order not found"}.
evals.expected_output: Anti-patterns flagged: 200-for-errors, verb URL, non-RFC 7807 error format
expectations: 200 OK for errors flagged as anti-pattern
Verb URL (/processOrder) flagged, noun URL proposed (/orders/{id}/confirm)
